historical_aliases.Bear: BearExpansion when ordinary bearish expansion is separated from CrisisStress
historical_aliases.Bull: BullExpansion when expansion/persistence is directly materialized

priority_order: Manipulation direct overlay if direct evidence is present
BullExpansion if bull and not bear
BearExpansion if bear and not bull

target_definitions.BearExpansion: persistent negative/risk-off expansion; must be separated from CrisisStress
target_definitions.BullExpansion: persistent positive/risk-on expansion; cannot be inherited from generic TrendExpansion without a root gate
target_definitions.Consolidation: sideways/range/chop with low directional conviction; must be separated from low-vol bull drift and post-crisis compression
target_definitions.Manipulation: direct market-microstructure/order-flow/order-lifecycle/event evidence only; OHLCV proxies are fail-closed
target_definitions.TransitionRecovery: turning-point, recovery, accumulation/distribution, or post-crisis transition state; optional root until consumer contract decides
target_definitions.UnknownOrMixed: residual bucket for overlap, weak confidence, or mixed signals; never release confidence
